role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on English text and vehicle branding ('Jeep', 'LIBERTY') to distinguish regions.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and settlement patterns (ranch-style homes).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Acer platanoides) and lawn grasses.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed infrastructure standards like utility poles, curbs, and road width.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (vehicle models, fencing, siding) to identify regional characteristics.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States by leveraging strong visual evidence (Jeep Liberty, utility poles, architecture) across all agent domains. The reasoning was consistent and well-supported by the image content.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified English text on the vehicle.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the suburban landscape and vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified deciduous trees and turf grass.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the utility poles and road infrastructure.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the Jeep Liberty and siding style.
